subject:

emails.subject:
Re: (00-322) Introduction of Mid-Columbia River Electricity Futures
 Contract
emails.subject_base:
(00-322) Introduction of Mid-Columbia River Electricity Futures
 Contract
emails.body: Re: (00-322) Introduction of Mid-Columbia River Electricity Futures Contract I am not in power any longer, but I would like to comment. The creation of this contract is the most ridiculous waste of time. How could you create a new contract when the existing contracts (PV and COB) should be shut down? KJM
